properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 89/14

1.ISPS SECURITY INFORMATION
PLEASE BE INFORMED THAT SEVERAL NORWEGIAN PORT FACILITIES ARE OPERATING ON MARITIME SECURITY LEVEL 2.
BEFORE ARRIVAL IN PORT, SHIPS MUST CLARIFY WITH THE PORT BY WHICH SECURITY LEVEL THE PORT FACILITY IS OPERATING.
DURING PORT CALLS SHIPS SHALL, AS A MINIMUM, OPERATE ON THE SAME SECURITY LEVEL AS THE PORT FACILITY.  

2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 85/14
